aboutSection.title: Trusted by the World’s Leading Companies for Over 23 Years
aboutSection.paragraph1: We have been at the forefront of the global automotive auction and logistics industry. Our journey began with a clear mission — to bring transparency, efficiency, and trust into vehicle trading and logistics.
aboutSection.paragraph2: Today, we proudly stand among the largest and most trusted automotive service providers across the Middle East and global markets, connecting buyers, sellers, dealers, and logistics partners through a powerful ecosystem built on reliability and innovation.

features.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
features.desc: We've earned the confidence of global brands through consistent delivery.

features.title: Expert Handling & Clearance
features.desc: Seamless documentation and cargo handling from start to finish.

features.title: Digital Logistics Platform
features.desc: Manage and optimize shipments with real-time tracking.

stickyStats.title: Smart vehicle logistics built for global mobility
stickyStats.paragraph1: We provide secure vehicle storage, efficient transportation, and complete pre-delivery inspection services designed to streamline automotive logistics across international markets.
stickyStats.paragraph2: From short-term parking to long-term storage maintenance and cross-border vehicle transport, our solutions ensure your fleet remains safe, optimized, and ready for delivery at every stage.

faqSection.title: Find Your Shipping Answers Here
faqSection.description: We are committed to providing excellent customer service throughout the entire vehicle shipping process.

items.question: What locations do you ship to and from?
items.answer: We operate across the Middle East, Asia, Europe, and North America, connecting major ports and auction hubs worldwide.

items.question: What types of shipping services do you offer?
items.answer: We offer air freight, ocean freight, road transportation, warehousing, customs clearance, and complete end-to-end vehicle logistics.

items.question: How can I get a quote for my shipment?
items.answer: Simply contact us via our quote form or speak to one of our logistics advisors for fast and accurate pricing.

cta.heading: Let’s Discuss Your Needs
cta.desc: Tell us what you need, and our experts will get back to you with the right solution.

auction.title: Auction Account Services
auction.intro1: Get access to auction accounts to bid on your vehicles. Nejoum also offers personalized training to get you on board with different US auctions. We can bid on your vehicle based on your specific target rate at any US auction. Among the most common platforms are Copart and IAAI.
auction.intro2: Additionally, Nejoum provides personalized training to help your team confidently navigate auction platforms. We create auction accounts based on your dealer license at no cost. Our experienced Auction Accounts team works closely with Copart and IAAI, assisting clients with smooth and professional business account creation.

benefits.title: Auction Account Creation
benefits.desc: We set up personalized auction accounts based on your dealer license, granting access to major US auctions like Copart and IAAI.

benefits.title: Personalized Training
benefits.desc: Tailored training sessions to help you and your team understand auction platforms and bid confidently.

benefits.title: Bidding Assistance
benefits.desc: Nejoum can place bids on your behalf according to your target price, ensuring you secure vehicles efficiently.

benefits.title: Expert Auction Guidance
benefits.desc: Our team provides professional support and advice, helping you navigate auction rules, registration, and bidding strategies.

benefits.title: Access to Exclusive Auctions
benefits.desc: Gain entry to special auctions and pre-release vehicle listings for better opportunities.

benefits.title: End-to-End Account Management
benefits.desc: From account creation to bidding support, we manage the entire auction process for you.

features.title: Auction Account Creation
features.description: We create personalized auction accounts for you based on your dealer license.

features.title: Personalized Training
features.description: Our team provides tailored training sessions to help you navigate auctions efficiently.

features.title: Bidding on Your Behalf
features.description: We can bid on vehicles for you according to your target rates.

features.title: Expert Auction Support
features.description: Guidance, account management, and troubleshooting for smooth auction participation.

features.title: Access to Exclusive Auctions
features.description: Access to special auctions and pre-release listings for competitive advantage.

accordion.title: What is included in Nejoum's Auction Account Services?
content: We provide complete support for account creation, personalized training, bidding assistance, and account management.

accordion.title: Do you help with account setup for major US auctions?
content: Yes. We create accounts for Copart, IAAI, and other major US auction platforms.

accordion.title: Can Nejoum place bids on my behalf?
content: Absolutely. We can bid on vehicles according to your target rates, helping you secure the vehicles you want without missing opportunities.

accordion.title: Do you provide training for using auction platforms?
content: Yes. We offer personalized training to familiarize you and your team with auction procedures, bidding strategies, and platform navigation.

accordion.title: Can you help with account management after creation?
content: Yes. We provide ongoing support for account updates, troubleshooting, and guidance to ensure your auction participation remains smooth and efficient.

towing.title: Towing Services
towing.intro1: Nejoum provides professional towing and vehicle pickup services across the United States, ensuring your auction vehicles are transported safely from auction yards to designated loading facilities. Our experienced dispatch team coordinates vehicle pickups directly from major auction platforms including Copart, IAAI, Manheim, RB Auction, and Adesa. Whether the vehicle is purchased from an auction or sourced from a dealership, our team ensures secure handling, timely pickup, and smooth transport.
towing.intro2: With our strong logistics network across the US, we focus on damage-free pickup, minimal storage charges, and efficient movement of vehicles to shipping locations. Our goal is to make the entire process fast, transparent, and hassle-free for buyers and dealers worldwide.

benefits.title: Nationwide Coverage
benefits.desc: Vehicle pickup services available across all US states with a trusted towing network.

benefits.title: Auction Expertise
benefits.desc: Experienced handling of vehicles purchased from Copart, IAAI, Manheim, RB Auction, and other major auction platforms.

benefits.title: Fast Pickup Coordination
benefits.desc: Vehicles are typically scheduled for pickup within 3 business days after receiving the required documents.

benefits.title: Damage-Free Handling
benefits.desc: Professional towing equipment and trained operators ensure safe vehicle transport.

benefits.title: Auction Storage Protection
benefits.desc: Efficient pickup scheduling helps minimize or avoid auction storage fees.

benefits.title: Real-Time Support
benefits.desc: Dedicated support team available to assist customers with towing coordination and updates.

features.title: Auction Yard Pickup
features.description: Vehicle collection directly from US auction yards.

features.title: Transport to Loading Facilities
features.description: Safe delivery of vehicles to the nearest warehouse or export loading yard.

features.title: Dispatch & Coordination
features.description: Professional dispatch team manages pickup scheduling and towing logistics.

features.title: Vehicle Type Handling
features.description: Support for sedans, SUVs, and standard passenger vehicles purchased through auctions.

features.title: Condition Check Support
features.description: Vehicles are inspected upon arrival at the yard and compared with auction images.

features.title: Pickup Status Updates
features.description: Customers receive updates regarding vehicle pickup and transport progress.

highlights: Pickup requests are scheduled after receiving the required Bill of Sale, Title, or Work Order.
Vehicles are typically collected within 3 days of receiving the pickup request.
If pickup is delayed beyond the scheduled period, storage responsibility may apply based on the service agreement.
The service applies mainly to standard vehicles such as sedans and SUVs.
Customers must report any condition discrepancies within 48 hours after the vehicle reaches the yard.
Vehicle condition should always be compared with auction photos upon arrival.

accordion.title: How long does it take to pick up a vehicle from the auction?
content: Once we receive the required documents (Bill of Sale, Title, or Work Order), the vehicle is usually picked up within 3 business days.

accordion.title: Which auctions do you support for towing services?
content: We coordinate towing from all major US auction platforms including Copart, IAAI, Manheim, RB Auction, and Adesa.

accordion.title: Where will my vehicle be transported after pickup?
content: Vehicles are transported to the nearest export yard or loading facility for further processing and international shipping.

accordion.title: What type of vehicles can be towed?
content: Our service mainly covers sedans, SUVs, and standard passenger vehicles purchased from auctions.

accordion.title: What should I do if I find damage after the vehicle arrives at the yard?
content: Customers must report any discrepancies between the vehicle and auction photos within 48 hours for investigation.

loading.title: Vehicle Loading & Container Services
loading.intro1: Nejoum Auction provides professional vehicle loading and container handling services to ensure every vehicle is transported safely from the auction yard to its final shipping destination. Our experienced logistics team follows strict handling procedures to protect vehicles during loading and transit. Using secure equipment, protective materials, and professional loading techniques, we ensure vehicles are safely placed inside containers with maximum protection.
loading.intro2: Each vehicle is inspected and photographed during the loading process, providing full transparency and documentation for customers. Whether you are shipping a single vehicle or multiple vehicles in a container, Nejoum ensures a smooth and reliable shipping experience. Our goal is simple: safe loading, damage handling, transport, and complete peace of mind for our customers.

benefits.title: Damage-Free Loading
benefits.desc: Vehicles are carefully secured using protective materials and professional loading techniques to minimize movement and prevent damage during transit.

benefits.title: Professional Handling Team
benefits.desc: Our trained loading specialists have extensive experience handling vehicles of different sizes including sedans, SUVs, trucks, and specialty vehicles.

benefits.title: Full Loading Documentation
benefits.desc: Photos of every vehicle are taken during the loading process, allowing customers to track and verify vehicle condition before shipment.

benefits.title: Secure Container Transport
benefits.desc: Vehicles are properly positioned and secured inside containers using chains, straps, and protective foam for maximum safety.

benefits.title: Flexible Shipping Options
benefits.desc: Ship a single vehicle or multiple vehicles in one container depending on your budget and shipping needs.

benefits.title: Project Shipments
benefits.desc: End-to-end logistics for complex industrial projects with dedicated project management.

features.title: Vehicle Inspection Before Loading
features.description: Basic condition check and documentation before the loading process begins.

features.title: Professional Container Loading
features.description: Vehicles are safely positioned inside containers using industry-standard securing methods.

features.title: Protective Equipment
features.description: Use of straps, chains, wheel locks, and protective materials to ensure vehicle stability.

features.title: Loading Photo Documentation
features.description: Photos taken during the loading process for transparency and customer verification.

features.title: Transport to Shipping Port
features.description: Vehicles can be transported from the yard to the designated shipping port using trusted logistics partners.

features.title: Shipping Coordination Support
features.description: Our team assists with container preparation and coordination for international vehicle shipment.

highlights: Vehicle Arrival: Vehicle arrives at Nejoum yard from auction or seller.
Inspection & Documentation: Basic inspection and condition photos are taken.
Container Preparation: Container is prepared with protective materials and securing points.
Professional Vehicle Loading: Vehicles are carefully loaded and secured using straps, chains, and protection materials.
Shipment to Port: Container is transported to the shipping port for export.

accordion.title: Can I ship only one vehicle?
content: Yes. You can ship a single vehicle using mix container shipping where multiple vehicles share one container.

accordion.title: How are vehicles protected during loading?
content: Vehicles are secured using chains, straps, and protective materials to prevent movement and ensure safe transit.

accordion.title: Will I receive photos of my vehicle during loading?
content: Yes. Our team documents the loading process and captures photos for verification and transparency.

accordion.title: Can Nejoum arrange transportation to the shipping port?
content: Yes. We provide logistics coordination and transportation support from the yard to the port.

accordion.title: What types of vehicles can be shipped?
content: Cars, SUVs, Pickup trucks, Luxury vehicles, Salvage vehicles and Commercial vehicles.

warehouse.title: Warehouse & Storage Services
warehouse.intro1: We provide comprehensive warehousing and open yard storage solutions tailored to the needs of exporters, importers, auction companies, dealerships, and global logistics partners. Our strategically located facilities are designed to support high-volume vehicle handling, secure cargo management, and efficient international shipping preparation.
warehouse.intro2: From short-term holding to long-term storage, we ensure every vehicle is stored in a safe, organized, and professionally managed environment. Our open yard spaces accommodate oversized and specialized vehicles, while our secure warehouse facilities protect high-value units and sensitive cargo from environmental exposure.

benefits.title: Dedicated Storage Space
benefits.desc: Secure warehouse and yard storage solutions for large cargo volumes and fleet management.

benefits.title: Consolidation & Deconsolidation
benefits.desc: Efficient cargo consolidation and breakdown services to streamline inbound and outbound logistics.

benefits.title: Vehicle Storage Solutions
benefits.desc: Specialized vehicle warehousing and open yard storage with organized lot management and secure handling.

benefits.title: Secure & Monitored Facilities
benefits.desc: Controlled access warehouses and monitored yards designed to ensure maximum cargo protection.

benefits.title: Oversized & Heavy Equipment Storage
benefits.desc: Spacious yard areas for storing oversized vehicles, machinery, and irregular cargo safely.

benefits.title: Integrated Logistics Support
benefits.desc: Seamless coordination between storage, transport scheduling, and export preparation services.

features.title: Customizable Storage Plans
features.description: Flexible short-term and long-term storage options for vehicles, machinery, containers, and general cargo tailored to your operational needs.

features.title: Advanced Security Infrastructure
features.description: 24/7 CCTV monitoring, controlled gated access, perimeter protection, and trained personnel to safeguard your assets at every stage.

features.title: High-Capacity Handling
features.description: Spacious indoor warehouses and expansive open yards capable of accommodating cars, trucks, boats, heavy equipment, and industrial freight.

features.title: Prime Logistics Location
features.description: Strategically positioned near major seaports, airports, and highways to reduce transit time and optimize shipping efficiency.

highlights: Cargo Arrival: Vehicles or cargo arrive at our warehouse from auctions, dealerships, ports, or transport partners.
Receiving & Inspection: Each unit is logged, inspected, and documented with condition reports and photos.
Inventory & Storage Allocation: Cargo is organized and assigned to secure warehouse space or open yard storage based on type and requirements.
Storage & Monitoring: Units are safely stored under strict security protocols with continuous yard management and tracking.
Dispatch & Outbound Coordination: When ready, cargo is prepared, scheduled, and released for transport to port or final destination.

accordion.title: What types of cargo can be stored?
content: We store vehicles including cars, SUVs, pickup trucks, commercial vehicles, salvage units, and selected heavy equipment depending on space availability.

accordion.title: Are your warehouse facilities secure?
content: Yes. Our facilities operate with controlled access, monitored yards, and organized inventory systems to ensure maximum protection.

accordion.title: Do you provide inspection reports?
content: Yes. Upon arrival, we conduct a basic inspection and provide condition photos for documentation and transparency.

accordion.title: Can I request vehicle preparation services while in storage?
content: Yes. We can coordinate services such as cleaning, battery support, minor preparation, and container loading preparation upon request.

accordion.title: How do I schedule vehicle pickup or dispatch?
content: Our logistics team coordinates outbound scheduling and transport once you confirm your shipment or delivery plan.

shipping.title: Shipping Services
shipping.intro1: Nejoum Auction provides reliable vehicle shipping services from the United States to destinations worldwide. Through our strong logistics network, we manage the entire process—from vehicle pickup at auction yards to international shipping and final delivery. Our team coordinates towing, yard handling, container loading, documentation, and global transport to ensure your vehicle moves safely and efficiently through every stage of the logistics process.
shipping.intro2: With strategically located partner warehouses across the United States and strong partnerships with major shipping lines, Nejoum ensures your vehicles are handled professionally and shipped through the most efficient routes. Whether you are buying a single car or multiple vehicles from auctions like Copart and IAAI, our logistics support simplifies the entire export process for you.

benefits.title: Global Shipping Coverage
benefits.desc: We ship vehicles from the United States to destinations worldwide through a trusted international logistics network.

benefits.title: End-to-End Logistics Management
benefits.desc: From auction pickup to container loading and overseas shipping, Nejoum manages the entire process for you.

benefits.title: Strategic Warehouse Locations
benefits.desc: Vehicles are transported to secure partner warehouses located across major U.S. logistics hubs.

benefits.title: Professional Vehicle Handling
benefits.desc: Our experienced teams handle towing, loading, and container stuffing carefully to prevent damage.

benefits.title: Reliable Shipping Routes
benefits.desc: Strong partnerships with global shipping lines ensure dependable schedules and optimized transit routes.

benefits.title: Customs Documentation Support
benefits.desc: We assist with export documentation, customs clearance, and compliance requirements to ensure smooth international delivery.

features.title: Auction Pickup & Towing
features.description: Vehicles are collected directly from auction yards and transported safely to designated warehouses.

features.title: Warehouse Storage & Handling
features.description: Short-term storage and preparation before container loading.

features.title: Vehicle Inspection & Preparation
features.description: Basic inspection and preparation to ensure vehicles are ready for international shipping.

features.title: Container Loading & Stuffing
features.description: Vehicles are carefully loaded into containers using professional equipment.

features.title: International Shipping Coordination
features.description: Booking with trusted shipping lines and managing the shipping process.

features.title: Documentation Support
features.description: Assistance with export documents and shipping paperwork.

features.title: Tracking & Updates
features.description: Clients receive updates during key shipping stages.

accordion.title: Can Nejoum ship vehicles to any country?
content: Yes. We ship vehicles from the United States to most international destinations through our global logistics network.

accordion.title: Do you handle vehicle pickup from auctions?
content: Yes. Our team arranges towing and pickup directly from auction yards such as Copart or IAAI.

accordion.title: Can you ship multiple vehicles in one container?
content: Yes. Multiple vehicles can be consolidated into a single container depending on vehicle size and shipping requirements.

accordion.title: How long does international shipping take?
content: Shipping time depends on the destination country, but typically ranges between 25 to 45 days including handling and transit time.

accordion.title: Do you assist with export documentation?
content: Yes. We support clients with necessary export documents and shipping paperwork to ensure smooth international delivery.

customs.title: Custom Clearance Services
customs.intro1: Experience seamless Custom Clearance Services with Nejoum. Our expert team ensures a smooth and stress-free process from port arrival to final delivery, handling all documentation, compliance checks, and regulatory requirements. We begin the clearance process with a thorough Notice for Arrival, officially initiating your vehicle's journey toward export readiness.
customs.intro2: Nejoum is your trusted partner for efficient vehicle customs clearance. Our dedicated professionals manage every step—from documentation verification to regulatory compliance—ensuring your vehicles are cleared quickly and correctly. The process starts with a comprehensive Notice for Arrival, marking the beginning of a seamless and hassle-free clearance experience.

benefits.title: Comprehensive Clearance Coverage
benefits.desc: We manage customs clearance for vehicles from the United States to international destinations, ensuring compliance with all import/export regulations.

benefits.title: End-to-End Clearance Management
benefits.desc: From port arrival to final delivery, Nejoum handles every step of the customs process including documentation, duties, and compliance checks.

benefits.title: Document Verification & Audit
benefits.desc: We review all vehicle titles and shipment documents to ensure they meet legal requirements for US and international customs clearance.

benefits.title: Risk & Compliance Control
benefits.desc: Our team identifies potential title or documentation issues early to prevent delays, fines, or shipment rejection at customs.

benefits.title: Efficient Clearance Processing
benefits.desc: Optimized workflows and experienced staff ensure vehicles are cleared quickly, minimizing waiting time at ports and inspection delays.

benefits.title: Customs Documentation Support
benefits.desc: We assist with all necessary paperwork, export declarations, and compliance checks to guarantee a smooth international delivery process.

features.title: Comprehensive Clearance Management
features.description: We handle all steps of the customs clearance process, including documentation, compliance checks, duties, and regulatory requirements to ensure smooth export.

features.title: Regulatory Compliance & Verification
features.description: Our team verifies that all vehicle titles and shipment documents meet US and international regulations, preventing delays and penalties.

features.title: Fast & Efficient Processing
features.description: From port arrival to final clearance, we expedite procedures with experienced staff and optimized workflows, minimizing waiting time for your vehicles.

features.title: Strategic Port & Logistics Coordination
features.description: Located near major US seaports, we coordinate directly with port authorities and transport partners to streamline customs clearance and outbound shipping.

Notice for Arrival & Documentation Initiation

accordion.title: What is included in Nejoum's custom clearance services?
content: We handle all steps of customs clearance including documentation verification, regulatory compliance, duties, and export approvals to ensure your vehicle is cleared efficiently.

accordion.title: Do you manage title verification and export eligibility?
content: Yes. Our team reviews vehicle titles and other required documents to confirm they meet US and international export regulations.

accordion.title: Can Nejoum assist if a title is missing or has issues?
content: Absolutely. We help obtain missing documents or resolve title discrepancies to make vehicles export-ready without delays.

accordion.title: How long does the customs clearance process take?
content: Processing times vary depending on port, documentation, and destination regulations, but our experienced team works to minimize delays.

accordion.title: Do you provide guidance for compliance and documentation?
content: Yes. We advise on required documents, export eligibility, and ensure all paperwork is complete to prevent customs issues.

title.title: Vehicle Title Services
title.intro1: Managing vehicle titles is one of the most important steps when purchasing vehicles from US auctions and exporting them internationally. A Vehicle Title is the official legal document that proves ownership of a vehicle and contains key information such as the VIN number, make, model, and ownership history.
title.intro2: At Nejoum Auction, we provide complete Title Management and Export Title Services to ensure your vehicles are processed, cleared, and prepared for export without delays or unnecessary costs. Our experienced team works directly with auction houses to track, verify, update, and process vehicle titles, ensuring all documents meet the legal requirements for international shipping and customs clearance.

benefits.title: Fast Title Processing
benefits.desc: Our team tracks vehicle titles directly from auctions to ensure they are received and processed quickly, reducing waiting time.

benefits.title: Export Compliance
benefits.desc: We ensure that your vehicle titles meet international export regulations, avoiding customs delays or additional inspection charges.

benefits.title: Auction Integration
benefits.desc: Nejoum works closely with major US auctions, allowing us to monitor title availability and update mailing instructions instantly.

benefits.title: Risk Reduction
benefits.desc: Our experts review titles to identify issues such as liens, pending titles, or non-exportable conditions before shipping.

benefits.title: End-to-End Support
benefits.desc: From title tracking to export documentation, we handle the entire process so your vehicles move smoothly from auction to shipping.

benefits.title: Title Transfer Management
benefits.desc: We manage the title transfer process efficiently, ensuring proper ownership documentation is completed accurately and ready for export without delays.

features.title: Title Tracking & Follow-Up
features.description: We track the title status of vehicles purchased at auctions and ensure they are mailed correctly to our processing locations.

features.title: Title Mailing Instruction Updates
features.description: Once your vehicle is purchased, we update the auction system to send the title to the correct location for export processing.

features.title: Exportable Title Verification
features.description: We verify that the vehicle title meets international export requirements before shipping.

features.title: Invalid Title Solutions
features.description: If a vehicle title has issues or is missing documentation, we assist in obtaining the required paperwork to correct the problem.

features.title: Export Guidance
features.description: Our team helps you understand the different title types and their eligibility for export, ensuring compliance with US and international regulations.

highlights: Proof of Ownership: Bill of sale or previous title showing the ownership transfer.
Vehicle Identification Number (VIN): Used to verify vehicle identity and history.
Vehicle Inspection Report (if required): Certain cases may require inspection verification.
Proof of Identity: Government issued ID or passport.
Title Processing Fees: Fees vary depending on location and title requirements.

accordion.title: What is a vehicle title?
content: A vehicle title is a legal document that proves ownership of a vehicle and includes important details such as VIN, make, model, and ownership history.

accordion.title: Why is the title important for export?
content: US customs require a valid title before vehicles can be loaded for international shipping. Without a proper title, vehicles may face delays or extra inspection.

accordion.title: How long does it take to receive a vehicle title?
content: Depending on the auction and vehicle status, titles can take a few days to several weeks to be issued.

accordion.title: What happens if a title is missing or invalid?
content: Our team assists in obtaining the necessary documents or corrections so the vehicle can become export eligible.

accordion.title: Can salvage vehicles be exported?
content: Yes, some salvage vehicles can be exported depending on the destination country’s import regulations.

footer.description: Our dedication lies in embracing challenges and pioneering innovation within the automotive logistics and vehicle export industry.
